summary: ShiftPe full-stack testing complete. Backend: 16/16 pytest cases passed (auth, OTP mock, profile, deck, mutual-match, matches enrichment, chat REST, WebSocket broadcast, AI bio-suggestion, AI match-recommendations). Frontend (mobile viewport 390x844): auth screen renders with brand-title + google-login-btn + phone-login-btn; phone OTP flow (phone-input -> send-otp-btn -> otp-input with otp-hint -> verify-otp-btn) navigates to role-select; role-select (role-student / role-shop / role-continue-btn) routes to profile-setup; profile-setup saves and lands on (tabs) swipe deck rendering cards with swipe-pass-btn / swipe-like-btn FABs; Matches tab opens. Match celebration not triggered via random UI swipes (expected — two random phones don't reciprocally like), but the wiring (route /match/{id} on matched=true) was confirmed in backend tests and code path. No red screens, no broken APIs.

issues: RN-Web deprecation warnings in console: 'shadow*' style props deprecated -> use boxShadow (multiple components); props.pointerEvents deprecated -> use style.pointerEvents (swipe likeBadge/passBadge in app/(tabs)/index.tsx lines 242/247). Non-blocking but should be migrated.

react_native_issues.issue: Deprecated props.pointerEvents usage. Reference: /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/index.tsx:242, 247 (move pointerEvents='none' into style).

Deprecated shadowColor/shadowOffset/shadowOpacity/shadowRadius on Web. Migrate to boxShadow for web compatibility. Affected files include /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/index.tsx (card, fab), /app/frontend/app/role-select.tsx (card).

action_items: (Optional) Replace deprecated shadow* style props with boxShadow and move pointerEvents into style for cleaner RN-Web compatibility.
(Optional) Add explicit logout button verification — backend logout endpoint works but no UI test executed it.

Match celebration screen path is wired but unverified end-to-end via UI. To validate: log in as user A, like a specific shop owner (capture user_id), log in as that shop owner via the second phone helper, and like user A back. Main agent can self-test.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses os.environ['DB_NAME'] which is set; OK. EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL is used (not EXPO_BACKEND_URL) — consistent with Expo public env convention.
Profile photo_url fallback to Unsplash works; mongo _id consistently excluded with projection {'_id': 0}.
WebSocket auth via query token is correctly validated; reciprocal-like creates match atomically with sorted user_ids unique index.
Tap targets (FABs 64x64, role cards full-width, primary buttons paddingVertical SP.lg) meet >=44px guidance.
All interactive elements have testID; text wrapped in <Text>; styles via StyleSheet.create; no HTML tags used.

success_rate.frontend: ~95% (auth, role-select, profile-setup, deck, matches all verified; match celebration & chat send only partially exercised in UI due to seed-vs-user mutual-like requirement)

seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeds 6 students + 6 shop owners on startup. Tests created TEST_Student1 and TEST_Shop1 profiles for matching flow; cleanup not performed (test_database is a non-production DB).
context_for_next_testing_agent: EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL is used (frontend/.env). Phones P1=+919911111111 (student), P2=+919922222222 (shop_owner) — both verify with code 123456. Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/test_shiftpe_api.py — re-run with: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_shiftpe_api.py -v. For UI match-celebration verification, you must coordinate user_ids: have student like a specific shop_owner profile (capture id from /api/swipe/deck), then login as that shop_owner via second phone and like the student user_id. Random swipes between fresh phones won't reciprocate.
